# Sale Order UBL Import - Import order line customer ref

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This is a glue module between `sale_order_import_ubl` and `sale_stock_line_customer_ref`.
It extracts customer references for specific lines from the XML received.

Since there's no specific element for customer reference in the UBL line,
the module will look into `cac:OrderLine/cbc:Note` and `cac:OrderLine/cac:LineItem/cbc:Note`
for a string prefixed with `customer_ref:`.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_order_import_ubl_line_customer_ref.wizard.sale_order_import.SaleOrderImport._get_order_line_customer_ref
documentation:
Extrapolate customer ref notes

`sale_order_import_ubl` will extract notes from
`cac:OrderLine/cbc:Note` and `cac:OrderLine/cac:LineItem/cbc:Note`.
